data.content: Implementation verified and all quality gates pass. The beat-detail-lightbox header now shows the natural beat ID and all aliases inline with click-to-copy (ClickToCopyId component), formatted as 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)'. Key changes in commit a978a9ff: getDisplayedBeatId and getDisplayedBeatAliases exported helpers, ClickToCopyId shared chip component, LightboxHeader renders aliases with pipe separators. Tests in beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts cover identity helpers. The dep-tree.tsx merge conflict from stashed changes was already resolved on main (worktree is clean). Lint (0 errors), typecheck, tests, and build all pass. Branch work/foolery-02d0 pushed to origin.
